hook.line1: How do we build trust in
hook.question: BufferLine builds a Cognitive OS where JDVP observes, Thinkprint extracts, and Meta Governance designs authority flow.

trackIntro.title: How This Deck Flows
trackIntro.subtitle: From framing to adoption, this deck explains why the BufferLine Cognitive OS matters and how it lands in the market.

narrative.title: Strategic Framing
narrative.description: Define the governance gap in language stakeholders can align on.

measurement.title: Domain Design
measurement.description: Position JDVP, Thinkprint, and Meta Governance as independent but composable domains.

adoption.title: Adoption Path
adoption.description: Translate protocol value into GTM, partnerships, and execution milestones.

trackIntro.conclusion: Use this deck for partners, investors, and strategy stakeholders.

point1.title: The Problem
point1.subtitle: The invisible risk of judgment delegation.

point5.title: Roadmap & Traction
point5.subtitle: Where we are and where we're going.

point1.title: The Problem: Invisible Judgment Shifts
point1.subtitle: AI is changing how we make decisions, but we can't see it.

invisible.title: Invisible Influence
invisible.description: AI subtly shapes our choices in ways we don't notice or measure.

nostandard.title: No Standard Measurement
nostandard.description: There's no protocol to track how much judgment we're delegating to AI.

risk.title: Growing Risk
risk.description: Without visibility, we can't manage the risks of over-reliance on AI.

point1.conclusion: We need a 'cognitive dashboard' for the AI age.

point2.title: BufferLine Cognitive OS: Observe, Extract, Govern
point2.subtitle: A domain architecture: JDVP observes, Thinkprint extracts, and Meta Governance designs authority systems.

jsv.title: JDVP Observation Domain
jsv.description: Captures judgment states and delegation shifts with JSV and DV telemetry.

dv.title: Thinkprint Extraction Domain
dv.description: Turns individual reasoning habits into explicit, inspectable, shareable modes.

citizenai.title: Meta Governance Domain
citizenai.description: Designs authority flow rules that connect evidence to policy, workflow, and organizational decisions.

point2.principle: Domain principle: each module works independently; synergy emerges when they are combined.

point3.title: Market Opportunity
point3.subtitle: AI governance and safety is a rapidly growing market.

tam.label: TAM
tam.description: Global AI governance, safety, and compliance market by 2028.

sam.label: SAM
sam.description: Enterprise AI risk management and observability tools.

som.label: SOM
som.description: Initial target: Finance, Healthcare, Education sectors.

drivers.regulation: Growing AI regulations (EU AI Act, etc.)
drivers.trust: Rising demand for AI transparency and trust
drivers.incidents: Increasing AI-related incidents and liability concerns

point4.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
point4.subtitle: Two adoption tracks under one brand architecture.

personal.title: For Individuals
personal.description: Thinkprint-based self-reflection that helps users keep decision ownership while using AI.

institutional.title: For Institutions
institutional.description: JDVP-powered governance workflows for safety, auditability, and regulatory readiness.

domainDiff.title: What Makes Each Domain Different
domainDiff.subtitle: Each domain solves a distinct problem that existing tools miss.

jdvp.title: JDVP
jdvp.description: Quantifies judgment shifts with JSV/DV vectors instead of relying on subjective trust surveys or post-hoc audits.
jdvp.diff: Observation, not opinion — real-time telemetry for judgment delegation.

thinkprint.title: Thinkprint
thinkprint.description: Extracts reasoning structure (not memory) into lightweight, remixable modes you can fork and compare.
thinkprint.diff: Logic-first extraction — not a cognitive twin, but a thinking playground.

metagov.title: Meta Governance
metagov.description: Designs authority flow rules that connect observation evidence to organizational policy and workflow.
metagov.diff: Authority architecture — governance as composable infrastructure, not compliance checklists.

point5.title: Roadmap & Traction
point5.subtitle: Execution milestones from protocol maturity to market adoption.

summary.title: Let's Build the Future Together

point1.label: The Problem:
point1.text: AI is invisibly changing how we make decisions.

point2.label: Our Solution:
point2.text: BufferLine Cognitive OS: JDVP for observation, Thinkprint for extraction, Meta Governance for authority architecture.

point3.label: The Opportunity:
point3.text: A $50B+ market with no clear leader yet.

summary.tagline: BufferLine: Brand, Protocol, and Governance Infrastructure for the AI Age
